16.en: or MCP. Once configured, you're free to start using context and performing actions in your connected tool. The

17.en: simplest way to ensure your connection is working is just to ask Claude if it has access to a specific tool.

25.en: They create a dynamic bridge across all the tools you use to get work done.

25.zh_cn: 它们在你用来完成工作的所有工具之间建立了一座动态的桥梁。

28.en: Instead of manually searching through tickets and trying to remember what each feature does, simply ask, "Pull

30.en: communications template." Watch as Claude automatically connects to Linear, identifies your completed sprint

31.en: tickets, and pulls the real feature descriptions, bug fixes, and improvements. Next, Claude finds your

32.en: release note template from your files.

33.en: No need to search through folders or remember where you saved it. Within moments, you have product release notes

33.zh_cn: 不需要翻找资料夹或记住存在哪里。几分钟内，你就有了产品发布说明，

34.en: that include actual future details, proper formatting, and your company style. Not generic

35.en: descriptions, but the real work your team shipped. These notes are ready to share with stakeholders,

35.zh_cn: 描述，而是你团队真正交付的工作成果。这些说明已准备好分享给利害关系人，

36.en: complete with accurate technical details and professional formatting. The same approach works across your entire

36.zh_cn: 包含准确的技术细节和专业的格式。同样的方法适用于你整个

37.en: workflow. Meeting notes become project tasks. Project updates become executive summaries. Documentation

38.en: becomes visual designs. Claude enhances your productivity by integrating seamlessly with your digital tools.

38.zh_cn: 变成视觉设计。Claude 透过与你的数位工具无缝整合来提升你的生产力。

39.en: Connect your workspace to unlock powerful workflows and automation. Visit claude.ai/directory
